description.ko: 우주의 깊은 곳에서 지켜보는 거대한 눈을 닮은 천체 형상의 장엄하고도 공포스러운 모습입니다.
description.en: A majestic and terrifying view of a celestial formation that resembles a giant eye watching from the depths of space.

prompt: A cinematic ultra-high-definition shot of VOID-3, depicting a 'Cosmic Eye' nebula. A central black hole iris is surrounded by a swirling accretion disk of #3D1A78 deep violet and #7B68EE indigo energy. Faint #E6E6FA lavender nebula clouds form the eyelid, drifting through the infinite #0D0221 obsidian abyss. Light from distant stars is stretched by gravitational lensing. 8k resolution, photorealistic cosmic dust, volumetric lighting, silent majesty.
